definitions: To make a short, light, audible contact with something, often repeatedly, to indicate entry or connection.
To connect or access a system, network, or resource, often by entering data or making a physical connection.
To score a goal in sports, especially soccer, by lightly kicking or pushing the ball into the net from close range.
examples: He will tap in his password.
The player managed to tap in the winning goal.
You can tap in to the main server from here.
